title: crotalaria albicaulis
intro: Crotalaria albicaulis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to stimulate the immune system, improve circulation, and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Crotalaria albicaulis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
